thig7.3:1.1:
Upacālā:
Having mindfulness, having an eye that sees,
thig7.3:1.2: a nun with developed faculties, I
thig7.3:1.4:
of which worthless people don’t partake.
Māra:
thig7.3:2.1: Why don’t you approve of birth?
thig7.3:2.2: One who is born enjoys sensual pleasures.
thig7.3:2.4:
Don’t later burn with regret.
Upacālā:
thig7.3:3.1: For one who is born there’s death,
thig7.3:4.2: the Rightly Awakened One, the undefeated one, born in the Sakyan clan.
thig7.3:5.4: & the noble eightfold path leading to the stilling of stress.
thig7.3:6.2: I dwell, delighting in his bidding.
thig7.3:7.4: that you have been, End-maker, struck down.
